summary: Tested iteration 58 feature: Admin first validation workflow (admin_review status). All core features verified - Admin can click 'Première validation' (amber button) to move expense to 'EN COURS DE CORRECTION' section, edit items freely (qty/price/add/remove/strike), save modifications, preview PDF, and send to manager. Backend correctly snapshots original_items/original_amount and recalculates amount excluding struck items.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 91-112: handleAdminFirstValidation correctly sends status='admin_review' with items payload
AchatsTab.jsx lines 114-131: handleSendToManager sends status='approved' with confirmation dialog
AchatsTab.jsx lines 133-149: handleSaveAdminReviewEdits saves edits without changing status
AchatsTab.jsx lines 151-188: updateAdminReviewItem/addAdminReviewItem/removeAdminReviewItem handle inline editing with real-time total recalculation
AchatsTab.jsx line 236: Counter correctly shows pending + admin_review count
AchatsTab.jsx lines 945-952: 'Première validation' button with amber color (bg-amber-600) and correct data-testid
AchatsTab.jsx lines 994-1267: Admin review section with amber background for admin, slate for manager
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1016-1017: Manager sees original_items/original_amount (snapshot before admin edits)
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1053-1181: Full inline editor for admin with category select, description input, qty input, PU input, total calculation, trash button
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1159-1167: 'Ajouter une ligne' button with correct data-testid
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1212-1260: Action buttons: Enregistrer modifications (gray), Aperçu PDF (blue), Envoyer à la gérante (green), Annuler validation (purple outline)
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1184-1207: Manager read-only view showing 'Liste d'origine (telle que soumise)' with original items
CaissePage.jsx lines 1576-1735: printExpensePDF correctly filters struck items and shows 'APERÇU (en cours de validation)' badge for admin_review status
Backend expenses.py lines 314-333: PUT /api/expenses correctly snapshots original_items/original_amount on first admin_review, recalculates amount excluding struck items

success_rate.backend: 100% (API correctly handles admin_review status, snapshots original data, recalculates amounts)

seed_data_creation: Created test expense 'TEST_Liste iter58' with 3 items (30000 F total). Tested admin_review workflow: Première validation → EN COURS DE CORRECTION section → edited qty (5→3), struck 1 item → Envoyer à la gérante → approved with 20000 F (excluding struck item). Test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 added admin first validation workflow. When admin clicks 'Première validation' on a pending expense, it moves to status='admin_review' and appears in 'EN COURS DE CORRECTION (votre profil)' section with amber background. Admin can freely edit items (qty, price, description, category), add/remove lines, and strike items with reason selection. Backend snapshots original_items and original_amount on first admin_review (doesn't change on subsequent edits). Manager sees 'EN COURS DE VALIDATION PAR L'ADMIN' section with locked badge and original list in read-only. Admin can: 'Enregistrer modifications' (saves without status change), 'Aperçu PDF' (shows preview with orange badge), 'Envoyer à la gérante' (changes to approved), 'Annuler validation' (reverts to pending). Counter in 'Validation en cours' tab shows pending + admin_review count.
